action.description:
Introduced by Senators Wall, Jacque, Wimberger, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives Spaude, Rivera-Wagner, Franklin, Behnke, Dittrich, Emerson, Kaufert, Kitchens, Moore Omokunde, O'Connor, Penterman, Sinicki, Stubbs, Tittl, Udell and Wichgers
